1850770.name: Century - Fellow Pack
1850770.description:
Stand out from the crowd with the Fellow Pack - an epic heap of dragons, customisations and consumables fit for every true dragoneer who want to leave their mark in the history of Century: Age of Ashes.

This pack includes :

- An Epic Dragon Skin for the Windguard
- An Epic Dragon Skin for the Marauder
- 1,000 Gems
- A Legendary helmet for the Windguard
- A Legendary helmet for the Marauder
- An Epic weapon for the Windguard
- An Epic weapon for the Marauder
- A 3-day xp booster
- 1 banner, player title, profile wallpaper and player icon

Please be cautious!! Purchasing this pack will prevent you from acquiring the contents of another DLC pack.
This pack is not eligible for a refund.
1850770.supported_languages: 英语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 法语, 日语
